overrides.override_summary: Must comply with Fast Food Act (AB 1228) on minimum wages, working hours, working conditions
overrides.why_it_matters: Higher labor costs for CA franchisees; may affect unit economics significantly

overrides.override_summary: Standard Hawaii franchise investment law disclosure requirements; no waiver of reliance
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional procedural protections for HI franchisees

overrides.override_summary: General Release at renewal/transfer does not apply to MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law liability
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees retain right to bring MD franchise law claims even after signing General Release

overrides.override_summary: Termination upon insolvency may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Adds protection against automatic termination in bankruptcy

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring MD Franchise Law claims in Maryland courts
overrides.why_it_matters: No need to litigate in Atlanta for MD-law claims

overrides.override_summary: 3-year limitations period for MD Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Clear deadline for bringing franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: Arby's will protect franchisee's trademark rights or indemnify per Minn. Stat. §80C.12
90 days notice of termination (60 days to cure); 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Longer notice periods than standard FA provisions

overrides.override_summary: Litigation cannot be required outside Minnesota; cannot require jury trial waiver, liquidated damages, termination penalties, or injunctive relief consent
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees cannot be forced to litigate in Atlanta

overrides.override_summary: Release at renewal/transfer does not apply to extent prohibited by MN Franchises Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Preserves MN franchise law claims through renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Nothing in agreement abrogates any MN Statutes Chapter 80C rights or remedies
overrides.why_it_matters: MN law protections preserved regardless of GA governing law clause
ND may limit enforceability of non-compete provisions

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require out-of-state arbitration or forum for ND franchisees
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees protected from Atlanta venue requirement

overrides.override_summary: No liquidated damages, termination penalties, jury trial waiver, or exemplary/punitive damages waiver
overrides.why_it_matters: Broad protection against one-sided damage provisions

overrides.override_summary: ND law governs, not other-state law

overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees do not waive claims at renewal

overrides.override_summary: ND statute of limitations applies, not contractual limitation
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot shorten limitations period by contract

overrides.override_summary: No-poach provisions removed from franchise agreements per AOD with WA AG
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisee employees can be hired by other Arby's franchisees
